rationale: The two papers are closely aligned in domain and approach: both analyze online review text with supervised deep learning, and the 2022 citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior marketing text-analytics work beyond bag-of-words/valence methods. Given the cited 2019 paper is a major earlier marketing study on theory-driven review-content coding at scale, this is plausibly a foundational/methodological prior rather than an incidental mention, so it should be retained for full relation judgment.
